name: Frank Gehry
abstract: Frank Owen Gehry ( GAIR-ee; né Goldberg; February 28, 1929 – December 5, 2025) was a Canadian and American architect and designer known for his postmodern designs and use of unconventional forms and materials. A number of his buildings, including his private residence in Santa Monica, California, have become attractions.

concerts.label: The Creative Process: John Adams and Frank Gehry

about_quotes.speaker: Wayne Shorter
about_quotes.evidence: We had the table together, with Herbie, his wife, my wife, Frank Gehry, who designed the place, Dudamel, and John Williams, and his daughter.
about_quotes.doc_title: Wayne Shorter — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
